creator: mp39590@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 151038
patch

Latest port of devel/git is failing on install stage with following error:

===>    Registering installation for git-2.2.1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/git/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/git/git-subtree.html: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Attached patch has fixed the issue for me.
